text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
During a shopping trip around the<n>station, I
happen to catch a glimpse of<n>someone in a
familiar uniform.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, she ducks into a<n>quiet
alleyway. I follow after her, and...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey! The hell do ya think you're<n>doin', followin'
me around?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Depending on your answer, I got<n>some ideas on
what to do with ya.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I wasn't following her,<n>and that I
was just worried because<n>she was heading
somewhere isolated.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? You're not even my<n>trainer, so I
guess that makes you a<n>busybody.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, don't worry. I'm just out<n>for a meal. A
few of my go-to<n>restaurants are down this alley.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
They're just little holes in the wall,<n>but the
food's good. Not to mention<n>cheap.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I can't decide if I want tripe stew or<n>curry today...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Oh. Like tripe, do ya? Don't see that<n>every day.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's an acquired taste, so a lotta<n>people don't like
it. Anyway, why'd<n>ya choose tripe?
choice_data_list: The rich flavor is perfect for a cold day.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see you're a fellow connoisseur<n>of healthy
dining.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The modern food they serve in the<n>cafeteria isn't
horrible, per se...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But sometimes you just wanna<n>enjoy some
good old-fashioned<n>stewed offal goodness
enhanced by<n>the natural sweetness of
vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. There's a<n>racecourse with a
shop that sells a<n>killer tripe stew.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll head there next time... At<n>any rate,
you better hurry on home<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Katsu curry? Lookin' for a boost of<n>good luck or
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's a load of superstitious<n>nonsense. But I
guess it's in our<n>nature to want to rely on a
greater<n>power.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I suppose it wouldn't hurt to play<n>along today.
choice_data_list:
They serve katsu curry at the academy, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I feel like eating alone<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If I eat at school, overly friendly folks<n>like
yourself will just keep droppin'<n>by to stick their
nose in my business.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Whereas here in the alley, I don't<n>need to say a
word beyond what I<n>want to eat.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Though, I guess the way they give<n>me
extra-large portions without asking<n>sometimes is
just their quiet way of<n>meddling.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. There's a<n>racecourse with a
curry restaurant<n>famous for its extra-large
portions.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll head there next time... At<n>any rate,
you better hurry on home<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Nakayama Festa<n>turns on her
heel and disappears into<n>the alley.
